title: When Did You First
questions: When did you first use the Internet? How was it?
When did you first go to the cinema? What did you see?
When did you first use a mobile phone? Who did you call?
When did you first think life was great? What happened?
When did you first travel alone? Where did you go?
When did you first have some real money? How did you feel?
When did you first think the world was a dangerous place?
When did you first smoke / drink alcohol?
When did you first fly? What was it like?
When did you first buy someone a present?
When did you first fall in love with someone or something?
When did you first study English? Did you like it?
When did you first buy something expensive? Do you still have it?
When did you first meet your best friend? Was it instant friendship?
When did you first hear your favourite song?
When did you first earn some money? Was it worth it?
When did you first decide on your own hairstyle? Did it look fantastic?
When did you first fail or did poorly in an exam?
When did you first regret doing something? Do you still regret it?
When did you first remember feeling real pain? What happened?
